title: あと1曲！　あと1曲だけ……！

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Yeah! Three! Two! One! Yes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaah! This is why concert DVDs are the
absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mm! Mmm! Glorious... Heavenly... Watching it is
like reliving the concert all over...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait! What time is it?! I gotta go soon or I'm
gonna be late!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, buut... right after this part is when they...

text_block_list.name: DVD Audio
text_block_list.text:
Thank youuu! There's so much energy here
tonight! The next song is a bit of a tearjerker. You
know the one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooohoohoo! Even the setlist is divine! Every
single aspect is just pure heaven!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just this song! I'll go right after this song!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but the singer right after this is super
awesome... Kehehe, fwaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital gets so caught up in her
DVD that she forgets to go to training.
